executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed with HTTP 404 error. The GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) was not found or is not accessible in the repository. This is a critical configuration error preventing any build execution. Root cause: Missing or inaccessible workflow file in the repository structure. Impact: Complete build pipeline failure - no builds can be triggered until workflow file is created and properly configured.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates that the .github/workflows/build.yml file does not exist in the repository or the GitHub token lacks necessary permissions to access it.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: Missing workflow file in repository structure. The .github/workflows/build.yml file has not been created or committed to the scib_demo repository on the main branch. Alternatively, the GitHub token may lack workflow/actions permissions, or GitHub Actions may be disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created and properly configured. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment processes.

errors.title: Workflow Dispatch API Endpoint Failure
errors.description: The GitHub API endpoint for workflow dispatch (https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches) returned a 404 status code across multiple attempts (attempts 1, 2, and 3).
errors.location: GitHub Actions API - Workflow Dispatch Endpoint
errors.root_cause: The workflow file path .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository, causing the API to return 404. This persisted across 3 consecutive attempts, indicating a structural issue rather than a transient error.
errors.impact: Prevents automated build triggering via API. Manual builds cannot be initiated programmatically. Blocks integration with external CI/CD orchestration tools and automated deployment pipelines.

errors.title: GitHub Token Permissions Verification Required
errors.description: The error message suggests that the GitHub token may be missing workflow/actions permissions. While the primary cause appears to be the missing workflow file, token permissions should be verified to ensure proper access rights.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled.
errors.root_cause: The GitHub personal access token may lack the 'workflow' scope required to dispatch workflow events. This scope is necessary for triggering GitHub Actions workflows via API.
errors.impact: Even after creating the workflow file, builds may fail if token permissions are insufficient. This would require token regeneration with proper scopes, causing additional delays in build pipeline restoration.

recommended_fixes.title: Create GitHub Actions Workflow File
recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file in the scib_demo repository with proper Maven build configuration.
recommended_fixes.automated_action: Use GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer to create .github/workflows/build.yml with standard Maven build workflow template including checkout, Java setup, Maven build, and test execution steps.
recommended_fixes.validation: Verify workflow file exists via GitHub API: GET https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/contents/.github/workflows/build.yml

recommended_fixes.title: Verify GitHub Token Permissions
recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the GitHub token has 'workflow' scope enabled to allow workflow dispatch operations.
recommended_fixes.automated_action: Test token permissions by attempting to list workflows: GET https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows with Authorization header.
recommended_fixes.validation: Successful API response with workflow list confirms proper permissions.

recommended_fixes.title: Enable GitHub Actions for Repository
recommended_fixes.description: Verify that GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings.
recommended_fixes.automated_action: Check repository settings via API: GET https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo and verify 'has_actions' field is true.

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error classification performed on build failure attempts 1-3. All attempts showed consistent 404 errors indicating missing workflow file. No Maven build logs available due to workflow dispatch failure.
compliance_notes.security_considerations: GitHub token should be rotated after issue resolution. Token permissions should follow principle of least privilege.
compliance_notes.remediation_tracking: JIRA ticket should be created to track workflow file creation and token permission verification. Estimated total resolution time: 8 minutes.

analyzer_notes: No GitHub Actions run ID available due to workflow dispatch failure. Analysis based on HTTP 404 error responses from workflow dispatch API endpoint. Maven build logs not accessible as workflow never executed. Primary issue is missing .github/workflows/build.yml file in repository structure.
